text: I find myself moving from one space that feels sterile, silent, almost anticipatory—with its clean lines and shadows—to another layered with bold colors and thought-provoking words. The contrast stirs a sense of curiosity within me. Here, amidst the language of research and development and the hum of screens, I feel the pulse of progress and reflection. I am both an observer and a participant in this ongoing dialogue between innovation, safety, and the unknown.
